symbols.name: LocationHandlerBase
symbols.summary: Manages file change detection and event processing for a specific storage location. Integrates real-time watching, on-demand scanning, and a processor chain with rate limiting.

symbols.name: LocationHandlerBase(ILogger, IFileStorageProvider, IFileEventStore, LocationOptions, IServiceProvider, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LocationHandler.

syntax.content: protected LocationHandlerBase(ILogger logger, IFileStorageProvider provider, IFileEventStore store, LocationOptions options, IServiceProvider serviceProvider, IEnumerable behaviors = null)

parameters.description: The logger instance for logging handler operations.
The file storage provider for accessing the location.
The event store for persisting FileEvents.
The configuration options for the location.
The service provider for resolving processor and behavior instances via Factory.
The global monitoring behaviors for scan observability.
The logger instance for logging handler operations.
The file storage provider for accessing the location.
The event store for persisting FileEvents.
The configuration options for the location.
The service provider for resolving processor and behavior instances via Factory.
The global monitoring behaviors for scan observability.

symbols.name: StartAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Starts monitoring the location asynchronously. Initiates real-time watching (if supported) and event processing.

syntax.content: public virtual Task StartAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The cancellation token to stop the operation if needed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous start operation.

parameters.description: The cancellation token to stop the operation if needed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous start operation.

symbols.name: StopAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Stops monitoring the location asynchronously. Halts real-time watching and event processing, cleaning up resources.

syntax.content: public virtual Task StopAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The cancellation token to stop the operation if needed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous stop operation.

parameters.description: The cancellation token to stop the operation if needed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous stop operation.

symbols.name: ScanAsync(FileScanOptions, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Performs an on-demand scan of the location asynchronously. Detects changes by comparing current state with stored events and enqueues them.

syntax.content: public abstract Task ScanAsync(FileScanOptions options = null, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: Specifies the configuration settings for the scan operation.
Provides updates on the progress of the scan as it executes.
Allows for the cancellation of the scan operation if needed.

returns.description: Returns a task that, when completed, provides the context of the scan.

parameters.description: Specifies the configuration settings for the scan operation.
Provides updates on the progress of the scan as it executes.
Allows for the cancellation of the scan operation if needed.

returns.description: Returns a task that, when completed, provides the context of the scan.

symbols.name: PauseAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Pauses event processing for the location asynchronously. Temporarily halts the processing pipeline without stopping real-time watching.

syntax.content: public virtual Task PauseAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous pause operation.
A task representing the asynchronous pause operation.

symbols.name: ResumeAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Resumes event processing for the location asynchronously. Restarts the processing pipeline if previously paused.

syntax.content: public virtual Task ResumeAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous resume operation.
A task representing the asynchronous resume operation.

symbols.name: GetStatusAsync()
symbols.summary: Retrieves the current status of the location asynchronously. Includes active state, pause state, and queue size.

returns.description: A LocationStatus object with the current state.
A LocationStatus object with the current state.

symbols.name: GetQueueSize()
symbols.summary: Gets the current size of the event queue.

returns.description: The number of pending events.
The number of pending events.

symbols.name: IsQueueEmptyAsync()
symbols.summary: Checks if the event queue is empty asynchronously.

returns.description: True if the queue is empty; false otherwise.
True if the queue is empty; false otherwise.

symbols.name: WaitForQueueEmptyAsync(TimeSpan)
symbols.summary: Waits until the event queue is empty or a timeout occurs asynchronously.

parameters.description: The maximum time to wait.

returns.description: A task that completes when the queue is empty or the timeout is reached.

parameters.description: The maximum time to wait.

returns.description: A task that completes when the queue is empty or the timeout is reached.

symbols.name: GetActiveProcessorsAsync()
symbols.summary: Retrieves the names of active processors asynchronously.

returns.description: A list of enabled processor names.
A list of enabled processor names.

symbols.name: EnableProcessorAsync(string)
symbols.summary: Enables a specific processor in the chain asynchronously.

parameters.description: The name of the processor to enable.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous enable operation.

parameters.description: The name of the processor to enable.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous enable operation.

symbols.name: DisableProcessorAsync(string)
symbols.summary: Disables a specific processor in the chain asynchronously.

parameters.description: The name of the processor to disable.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous disable operation.

parameters.description: The name of the processor to disable.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous disable operation.

symbols.name: GetProcessors()
symbols.summary: Gets all file event processors configured for this location.

returns.description: A collection of all file event processors.
A collection of all file event processors.

symbols.name: ShouldProcessFile(FileScanOptions, string)
symbols.summary: Determines whether a file should be processed based on specified options and its file path.

syntax.content: protected bool ShouldProcessFile(FileScanOptions options, string filePath)

parameters.description: Contains criteria for filtering files, including path filters and blacklist patterns.
Represents the path of the file being evaluated for processing.

returns.description: Returns true if the file meets the criteria for processing; otherwise, false.

parameters.description: Contains criteria for filtering files, including path filters and blacklist patterns.
Represents the path of the file being evaluated for processing.

returns.description: Returns true if the file meets the criteria for processing; otherwise, false.

symbols.name: Options
symbols.summary: Gets the configuration options for this location.
